# ontai-dev

**Operator Native Thinking** — the discipline that makes Kubernetes mean something at the organizational level.

## Repositories

| Repository | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| [conductor](https://github.com/ontai-dev/conductor) | Compiler and Conductor agent | alpha |
| [guardian](https://github.com/ontai-dev/guardian) | Trust root and security substrate | alpha |
| [platform](https://github.com/ontai-dev/platform) | Cluster lifecycle authority | alpha |
| [wrapper](https://github.com/ontai-dev/wrapper) | Pack delivery engine | alpha |
| [seam-core](https://github.com/ontai-dev/seam-core) | Lineage and semantic DNS | alpha |
| [domain-core](https://github.com/ontai-dev/domain-core) | Domain primitive declarations | alpha |
| [ontai-schema](https://github.com/ontai-dev/ontai-schema) | OpenAPI JSON Schema specification | alpha |

## The Standard

Import the ONT schema specification:
https://schema.ontai.dev/v1alpha1/index.json

## Documentation

Founding document, companion documents, and operator validation
framework: https://ontai.dev

## Philosophy

The cluster is the documentation. Every governance decision is a
versioned object. Every contract is a reconciled resource. The
organization becomes queryable.
